title: CI workflow with staged AOT pipeline and interop tooling split
body:
Added CI with workspace checks, **interop freshness** validation, ABI/dispatch parity tests, and **AOT smoke** tests—reflecting a staged compile pipeline rather than a single `cargo test` blob.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`24baf3b`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/24baf3b)
- **Subject:** Add CI workflow with workspace checks, interop freshness validation, ABI/dispatch parity tests, and AOT smoke tests
- **Completed:** 2026-02-27

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `codegen-runtime`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-execution-jit-gc`

## Relation
Prototype JIT/lowering work regressed easily without automated smoke coverage; CI encoded the minimum bar before compiler history moved to the dedicated submodule. Patterns reused in compiler repo CI for v0.1+ release and pack flows.
